text:
A person is not entitled to a hearing in either of the following cases:

(a) If the action by the department is made mandatory by this code.

(b) If the person has previously been given an opportunity with appropriate notice for a hearing and failed to request a hearing within the time specified by law.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 3. Investigation and Hearing [13800 - 14401]
#### Article 3. Hearing [14100 - 14112]
##### § 14101

A person is not entitled to a hearing in either of the following cases:

(a) If the action by the department is made mandatory by this code.

(b) If the person has previously been given an opportunity with appropriate notice for a hearing and failed to request a hearing within the time specified by law.

*(Amended by Stats. 1991, Ch. 13, Sec. 32. Effective February 13, 1991.)*

subsections.text: A person is not entitled to a hearing in either of the following cases:

subsections.label: a
subsections.text: If the action by the department is made mandatory by this code.

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: If the person has previously been given an opportunity with appropriate notice for a hearing and failed to request a hearing within the time specified by law.
